allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add devcontainer template with VS Code configuration

Initial setup of the devcontainer template including:
- DevContainer configuration with Node.js base image and Python 3.14
- Lifecycle scripts for environment initialization
- VS Code settings, tasks, and stack-based extension management
- Modern CLI tools setup \(fzf, ripgrep, bat, eza, zoxide\)
- Oh My Zsh with Starship prompt configuration
- Pre-commit hooks configuration examples
- CLAUDE.md documentation for AI assistance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh pr create --title "feat: add devcontainer template with VS Code configuration" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF''
## Summary
- Initial setup of the devcontainer template for standardized development environments
- DevContainer configuration with Node.js base image, Python 3.14.2, and Git
- VS Code settings, tasks, and stack-based extension management system
- Modern CLI tools setup \(fzf, ripgrep, bat, eza, zoxide\) with Oh My Zsh and Starship prompt
- Pre-commit hooks configuration examples for code quality enforcement
- CLAUDE.md documentation for AI-assisted development

## Test plan
- [ ] Open repository in VS Code and use "Dev Containers: Reopen in Container"
- [ ] Verify container builds successfully
- [ ] Confirm CLI tools are installed \(eza, fzf, bat, etc.\)
- [ ] Test extension installation script: `.vscode/extensions/install_by_stack.sh`
- [ ] Verify pre-commit hooks work after copying example config

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.ai/code\)
EOF
\)")
